leadText: Dendemille Town (Japanese: フウジョタウン Fūjo Town) is a town located in the Kalos region. It is connected on the west by Route 15, on the east by Route 17, and on the north by the Frost Cavern.

sections.title: Slogan
sections.text: Slogan [ edit | edit source ] A town where fluff dances on the wind. (Japanese: 綿毛 舞い飛ぶ 風の町 A town where fluff dances on the wind. )

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Move Reminder and Move Deleter's house [ edit | edit source ] The Move Reminder and Move Deleter are in a house just northeast of the Pokémon Center . Like all games since Generation III except FireRed and LeafGreen , the Move Reminder teaches a Pokémon a move it has forgotten in exchange for a Heart Scale . Moomoo Milk seller [ edit | edit source ] A Hex Maniac outside the Pokémon Center will sell the player Moomoo Milk. Hex Maniac Moomoo Milk $ 500 Moomoo Milk ×12 $ 6,000
